title: orchis patens subsp. falcicalcarata
intro: Orchis patens subsp. falcicalcarata, also known as the yellow helleborine, is a terrestrial orchid native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the roots and tubers of Orchis patens subsp. falcicalcarata are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
